creator: ardovm@yahoo.it
text:
I found the source of this problem right after posting the report.
This problem happened after I upgraded to lang/perl5.10: I was missing
the option WITH_USE_PERL.

After having recompiled lang/perl5.10 with the option WITH_USE_PERL
set to "true", I could install the port chinese/ttf2pt1 with no
problems.

IMHO the importance of the option WITH_USE_PERL should be pointed out
in /usr/ports/UPDATING, at the entry 20090328. Other ports need that
option, such as multimedia/ffmpeg.
-- 
rigo

http://rigo.altervista.org
